settle.note: This action creates a transfer from your personal wallet to the wallet used by the member who paid first, then offsets the matching debt.

notifications.title: Notification Settings
notifications.desc: Manage which events send alerts to you.

notifications.budgetDesc: Red alert when you overspend the planned amount for a category.
notifications.weeklyDesc: Send a summary of your financial status every Sunday via email.

data.title: Storage & Recovery
data.desc: Control the entire local data repository of the application.
data.backupDesc: Download all assets and transactions in a secure .json format.
data.importDesc: Restore data from a previously exported backup (.json) file.
data.importModalDesc: Current settings will be overwritten by the backup file.
data.importNotice: The JSON Backup file import feature is under development.
data.resetDesc: This action formats the database, used in case of app cache errors. Unbacked data will be completely lost.
data.resetModalDesc2: stored in LocalStorage will be wiped clean and CANNOT BE RECOVERED without a backup .json file.
